Interface IRemapFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control remap function arguments.

[Guid("62E3ED53-771D-4CB4-8E27-2800991EBF31")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRemapFunctionArguments2 : IRemapFunctionArguments

Properties

AllowUnmatched 

bool AllowUnmatched { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

DefinitionExpression

The definition expression on the remap table.

string DefinitionExpression { get; set; }

Property Value

string

The array of area of interest polygons.

InputMaxField

The pixel values in the range [InputField, InputMaxField) are mapped to OutputValue.

string InputMaxField { get; set; }

string
